title: elaphoglossum brevipetiolatum
intro: Elaphoglossum brevipetiolatum is a species of epiphytic fern, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms associated with colds and flu. Elaphoglossum brevipetiolatum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some regions, it is also used in traditional medicine to make a syrup or tincture.
